---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Mahshad Sarikhani"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: hero-notes
    contents: 
      - "notes/**/*.qmd"
      - "!notes/index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: assets/templates/hero-note.ejs
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, maturity, path, description]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

::: {.hero-section .hero-section--split}

::: {.hero-left}
[Mahshad *Sarikhani*]{.hero-name}

[MD · quantitative and computational methods for IBD imaging]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.hero-bio}
A doctor who codes. My field is quantitative imaging in inflammatory bowel disease, the problem of turning what radiologists see into numbers that hold up.

I came to this as a clinician, which shapes how I work: I sit between the imaging side that knows the disease and the computational side that knows the models, two camps that rarely overlap. Ulcerative colitis is my main focus, mostly through MR enterography.
:::

:::

::: {.hero-portrait}
![](assets/img/headshot.jpg){.hero-photo}
:::

:::

::: {.worklist}
::: {.worklist-label}
[selected work]{} [[research →](work\index.qmd)]{}
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Colonic motility on MRE and endoscopic activity in ulcerative colitis](work\studies\uc-motility\index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[Jun 2026]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
ESGAR 2026 oral presentation · Manuscript ready to submit
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Bayesian risk stratification for non-invasive triage of UC activity](work\studies\uc-mre-bayes\index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[Jun 2026]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
ESGAR 2026 oral presentation · preprint in preparation
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Radiology Reports Pipeline](work/tools/reports-pipeline/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[in progress]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Parsing and de-identifying ~9,800 free-text abdominal reports for longitudinal IBD research
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[IBD Imaging Digest](work/tools/ibd-digest/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[live tool]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
A daily pipeline that fetches, ranks, and tiers new IBD imaging papers
:::
:::

:::

::: {.terminal-card .terminal-card--notes}

```{=html}
<header class="term-bar">
  <span class="term-dot"></span><span class="term-dot"></span><span class="term-dot"></span>
  <span class="term-title">~/notes</span>
  <a class="term-all" href="notes/index.html">all →</a>
</header>
```

::: {.term-body}

```{=html}
<div class="term-prompt-line"><span class="term-prompt">$</span> ls --recent notes/<span class="term-cursor"></span></div>
```

::: {#hero-notes}
:::

:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin: 3rem 0 2rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #4a9a88; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;"}
[About](about/index.qmd) · [CV](cv/index.qmd) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ) · [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa)
:::
